calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Stella Gi is present.
Attorney Aimee Kelley representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-19-2011 is vacated.
